overview: Superior Genetix provides telehealth hormone optimization and medical weight loss treatments through licensed physicians in all 50 states. Care is delivered entirely online with home medication delivery and continuous patient support.
highlights: Telehealth only, no in-office visits required
24/7 concierge email support with typical response within minutes
Home delivery with automated refills and comprehensive initial diagnostics
targetAudience: Men seeking testosterone replacement and individuals interested in hormone optimization or medical weight loss treatment.
